overview: LinkUp.com is a B2B industrial marketplace platform connecting buyers and suppliers. Features a public dashboard with live metrics, buyer and supplier portals with full onboarding, RFQ management, pricing calculators with Indian Rupee fee logic, analytics dashboards, an admin panel, and a floating AI chatbot assistant.
features: Public dashboard with top buyers, suppliers, and products
Buyer portal with catalog, RFQ management, and supplier directory
Supplier portal with product management, RFQ leads, and billing
Multi-step buyer and supplier onboarding wizards
Pricing calculators for all buyer tiers and supplier sizes (INR)
Admin dashboard with user verification and fee management
Floating AI chatbot with fee calculator and portal guidance
Internet Identity authentication with role-based access control
Analytics and reporting with interactive charts
